text: Finalize the priority = expected value / effort implementation.
description:
Let's develop a sound mathematical/economic model. 
Expected value and time are also connected. 
So we should also track duration maybe in order to discount that (cost of capital), when aims take longer time until return of invest. This should really become economically sound

status.comment: Finalized priority calculation by introducing a discount rate (5% per cost unit) to account for time/duration (Cost of Capital). Priority = (Value / (1+r)^Cost) / Cost.
